name: fusionpcr-studio
description: Local-first PCR primer inspection and amplicon estimation studio.

scripts.smoke:pages: npm run build && npm run smoke:pages:dist
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e:functional && npm run test:e2e:smoke && npm run test:e2e:accessibility
scripts.test:e2e:accessibility: npm run build && playwright test --project=chromium-accessibility tests/e2e/accessibility.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:functional: npm run build && playwright test --project=chromium-functional tests/e2e/app.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: npm run build && playwright test --project=chromium-smoke --project=firefox-smoke --project=webkit-smoke tests/e2e/smoke.spec.ts tests/e2e/deployed-smoke.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:visual: npm run build && playwright test --project=chromium-visual tests/e2e/visual.spec.ts
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test && npm run test:e2e && npm run smoke:pages:dist && cargo test --workspace
